361 J1700A_FALL_30_DAY_CD J1700A_FALL_30_DAY_CD J1700A Fall History on Admission: Fall 30 Day Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had a fall at any time in the last month prior to admission/entry or reentry. -=Not assessed/no information
